textByHash.412dabf829e489c6a867fce98887f754cd548919: It's all very bright round here, isn't it?
textByHash.a01a9baa5f22f876a4e1aa654dadb6c3858e1fb1: I think it would all look better in a nice dark green. At least then I wouldn't be squinting all the time.
textByHash.46193e017e41628f90623aa65b7b46ccb171a295: Bah, humans have no sense of style...
textByHash.354ba8db5b6041876e5378068460abb918b26617: Thank you kindly. I haven't got used to this human food and drink yet.
textByHash.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
textByHash.6cec3a542d695ed05b6bc234ee648aeff372f7af: It's all very white round here, isn't it?
textByHash.1c7f02bd60481469c3e3a50a834f09d5ec22ef7d: I think it would all look better in pink. At least then I wouldn't be squinting all the time.
textByHash.2a8e059628dbba0b1ebe5ba6dd865825827be779: You're probably right. Maybe brown, then.
